title: Coco&Coir Door Mat | Non-Slip | Thick Coir | Premium Quality | Rubber Backed | Eco-Friendly | Indoor | Outdoor | Heavy Duty | Leaves Themed | Entrance Door Mat | 45 x 75 cm (Early Leaves)
features: HIGH QUALITY - This highly absorbent doormat is sturdy, long lasting and ideal for all round use. Its ideal of both both indoor and outdoor use and acts as a barrier to help remove dirt entering your home.

RUBBER NON-SLIP BACKING - The heavy duty door mat can be used on any surface and comes with an anti-slip backing that keeps the mat in its place even when walked on along giving good brushing action to clean your shoes.

OPTIMAL SIZES - This entrance mat with 1.5cm thickness comes with ridged surface provides quality scraper area of 45 x 75 cm. This allows perfect surface to clean your shoes well without being bulky at the door.
VARIETY OF DESIGN - Our range of mats comes with variety of fancy designs and you will surely find the one that best suits your character and your home.
ECO FRIENDLY - Door Mat if made from Coir that is 100% Natural with sturdy quality that will last longer and also adds appeal to your door step.
